rule: Business occupancy (Group E) includes offices, banks, and professional establishments.
Wet pipe sprinkler systems are required for Mechanical rooms under Ordinary Hazard Group 1.
Heat detectors are preferred in mechanical rooms due to presence of equipment that may cause false alarms with smoke detectors.
Every floor with occupancy load exceeding 50 persons shall have minimum 2 exits. Exceeding 500 persons requires minimum 3 exits.
Maximum travel distance to exit for Business occupancy is 30 metres in non-sprinklered buildings and 45 metres in sprinklered buildings.
Staircase enclosures in buildings above 15m height shall have fire resistance rating of minimum 2 hours.
CO2 or dry powder extinguishers are required in electrical and mechanical rooms. Water-type extinguishers are prohibited.
For Group E Business occupancy below 15m height, wet riser is not mandatory. Above 15m, wet riser with terrace tank minimum 25000 litres is required.
Light Hazard occupancy design density is 2.25 lpm/m2 over 84m2 design area. Ordinary Hazard Group 1 is 5.0 lpm/m2 over 72m2.
Maximum coverage area per sprinkler head for Light Hazard is 21m2 and for Ordinary Hazard Group 1 is 12m2.
